description.zh: 为聊天注入计划模式开关、PLAN.md 计划协作工具，以及 <plantodo> 计划渲染与一键开始实施流程。
description.en: Adds a planning-mode toggle, PLAN.md collaboration tools, and <plantodo> rendering with one-tap implementation handoff.

description.en: Read and complete the current workspace PLAN.md.
